fields.title: Ensure prompt caching is preserved
fields.description:
Ensure the frozen snapshot caching behavior is maintained for prompt caching efficiency.

Acceptance criteria:
- Frozen snapshot still cached in Ref
- Reload on session_start/session_switch
- No unnecessary reloads during active session
- Cache hit optimization preserved
fields.close_reason: Already preserved - frozen snapshot cached in Ref, reloads on session_start/session_switch
